sections.paragraph:
Original: כּשׁר

Transliteration: kâshêr

Phonetic: kaw-share'

BDB Definition:

  1. to succeed, please, be suitable, be proper, be advantageous, be right and proper to
    1. (Qal) to please, be proper
    2. (Hiphil) to give success

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1052

Part(s) of speech: Verb
